title: Zork I - The Great Underground Empire
description: A full translation of Infocom's classic adventure game from the original ZIL source code to Inform 7. 110 rooms, 19 treasures, a roaming thief, and every puzzle faithfully reproduced. Multiple versioned milestones track the evolution from raw translation to bug-fixed, multimedia experience.

title: Dracula's Castle
description: Explore Dracula's Castle and uncover its dark secret before midnight strikes. A horror-themed adventure written in Inform 7.

title: Fever Dream
description: Three items alter your perception. The world stays the same. You do not.

title: Babel Fish Puzzle Permutation 2013 - An Homage To Adams and Meretzky
meta: An Homage To Adams and Meretzky
description: A recreation of the classic Babel Fish puzzle from The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy text adventure. Place items in the right spots, then push the button to catch the fish.
